name: Banana Oat Cookies
recipeIngredient: 4-7 cups any combination of: raisins &/or dates
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the mashed bananas and sugars together until smooth.
2. Stir in the egg replacer and water, then beat thoroughly.
3. Add vanilla, salt, and baking soda, mixing well after each addition.
4. Fold in the flour and oats until combined.
5. Scoop golf ball-sized portions onto a greased baking sheet, spacing them 4 inches apart.
6. Bake at 400°F for 8-10 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Allow to cool completely before eating.
